title: UX/UI Strategy & Design Systems

miniCase.description: Complete UX overhaul of financial dashboard increased daily active users and reduced support tickets by 60%

benefits: Psychology-driven design increasing conversions by 200%+
Scalable design systems reducing future development costs
WCAG 2.1 AA compliance ensuring legal protection
User research-backed decisions eliminating guesswork
Cross-platform consistency building brand trust

problems: Inconsistent user experience across different pages and platforms
High bounce rates due to confusing navigation and poor information architecture

Design decisions based on assumptions rather than user research data
solutions: Systematic design approach ensuring consistency across all touchpoints
User research-driven information architecture optimizing conversion funnels
Built-in WCAG 2.1 AA compliance protecting against legal risks
Data-driven design decisions backed by user testing and behavioral analytics
